node.title: Software Engineer II - Machine Learning | coding interview

topic.title: Software Engineer II - Machine Learning | coding interview

post.content: I have coding live interview next week. can anyone who had this interview recently let me know the trendy questions \n\nThanks

I had on the first Coding (phone screening) interview this week and they\'ve asked me to build a HashMap like date structure with next methods: put(key, value), get(key) returns value  and returnRandom() returns key and value, the catch is that all the three methods have to be O(1) it\'s very similar to "380. Insert Delete GetRandom O(1)" https://leetcode.com/problems/insert-delete-getrandom-o1/description/\nAlthough I made a working solution,  I got negative response. Good luck! And keep us posted, I\'m curious to have your perspective.
I gave my interview last Monday and the recruiting team seems to have ghosted me. Either of you faced that?\n
Hello, I have mine this week. how did your interview go? Can you share what they asked?
